title: potentilla chrysantha subsp. chrysantha
intro: Potentilla chrysantha subsp. chrysantha, also known as the yellow potentilla, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and deciduous leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Potentilla chrysantha subsp. chrysantha include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and cholesterol. Potentilla chrysantha subsp. chrysantha can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
